#  Search for and Filter Specifications 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * Search respects any selected filter parameters (including "set" and "division") and limits the scope of the search to the filtered results.


##  Steps 
  * Filter Specifications by Division or Set
  * Search for a Specification
  * Search text within a Specification


### Filter Specifications by Division or Set
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Select your filters:
     * Division
     * Set


### Search for a Specification
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. In the **Specifications** tab, enter a keyword into the search box and press **ENTER** on your keyboard.
  3. Search returns results for data within the following fields:
     * Division
     * Number
     * Set Name
     * Title


### Search Text within a Specification
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click open a specification section.
  3. Click the **search** bar.
  4. Enter your keyword, then press **ENTER** on your keyboard.


## See Also
  * [Should I enable the Specifications tool on my project?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-should-i-enable-the-specifications-tool-on-my-project)
  * [Delete Specification Section Revisions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/delete-spec-section-revisions)
  * [View the Deleted Specifications Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-deleted-specifications-report)
title: Search for and Filter Specifications
description: How to search and filter specifications in your project's Specifications tool.
